Why do you think it's important to celebrate national holidays like Independence Day and Heroes Day? Write at least 3 sentences.
Compare Hina Matsuri (Japan) and Galungan (Bali, Indonesia). How are they similar and different? Write at least 4 sentences.
Why do people migrate to different countries? Using Vijay's family as an example, explain why his ancestors moved. Write at least 3 sentences.

Indonesian public holidays include Independence Day (17 August), Heroes Day (10 November), and Youth Pledge Day (28 October). Why do you think we need so many holidays to remember our history? Write at least 3 sentences.
